meta.title: Congressional Testimony: Nuclear Negotiations with Iran - What Do America's Allies Think?
meta.description: Michael Doran’s testimony before the U.S. Senate Committee on Foreign Relations regarding nuclear negotiations with Iran and the perceptions of America’s Middle Eastern allies.
